ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the match belongs to */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, played, postponed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the opponent team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the opponent team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the competition */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization that governs the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken during the match */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made during the match */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given during the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given during the match */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed during the match */,
  "possesion" REAL /* Percentage of possession during the match */,
  "offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player during the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the player during the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the player during the match */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player during the match */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player during the match */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team administrator, analyst, coach) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_versions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_versions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_versions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)
